TABLE.NAME: local_groupgrades
TABLE.COMMENT: Stores group-specific grade adjustment rules per course

FIELD.NAME: gradeitemid
FIELD.COMMENT: Target grade item to override (e.g. Course Total)

FIELD.NAME: rule_type
FIELD.COMMENT: Rule type: factor_multiplier, bonus_points, or top_n_of_m

FIELD.NAME: rule_value
FIELD.COMMENT: For factor/bonus: the numeric value. For top_n_of_m: N (how many top grades to average)

INDEX.NAME: courseid_groupid
INDEX.COMMENT: Fast lookup of rules by course and group

INDEX.NAME: gradeitemid
INDEX.COMMENT: Fast lookup by target grade item

TABLE.NAME: local_groupgrades_items
TABLE.COMMENT: Pool grade items for top_n_of_m rules

FIELD.NAME: gradeitemid
FIELD.COMMENT: Grade item that belongs to the pool for this rule

INDEX.NAME: ruleid
INDEX.COMMENT: Fast lookup of pool items by rule

INDEX.NAME: gradeitemid
INDEX.COMMENT: Fast lookup — which rules include this item in their pool
